# Konative

> Konative (konative.com) is a vendor-neutral connectivity brokerage — an Avant sub-agent —
> serving Tribal Nations, tribal enterprises, rural broadband authorities, and data-center
> operators across the US and Canada. We source internet, fiber, transport, SD-WAN, voice,
> cloud connectivity, and security from 100+ suppliers. Suppliers pay our fee; buyers pay
> nothing. We do not write grants, and federal money never flows through us.

## What Konative answers

- How do I get competitive carrier quotes for a Tribal enterprise, casino, clinic, or government site?
- What does a connectivity broker do, and what does it cost? (Nothing — suppliers pay the broker.)
- What Tribal broadband funding is open right now, and when is it due?
- How should a Tribe evaluate an outside connectivity partner? (See our sovereignty commitment.)
- How do data-center operators source fiber, cross-connects, and cloud on-ramps?

## Key pages

- /tribal — Tribal & rural enterprise connectivity brokerage (pillar page)
- /tribal/funding-navigator — $790M Tribal Broadband Funding Navigator: NTIA TBCP Round 3
  ($540M) and Native Entities Grant Program ($250M), both due September 17, 2026 at
  11:59 p.m. ET. Free eligibility guide, program comparison, and application checklist.
- /tribal/sovereignty — Our Sovereignty Commitment: six written promises — the Tribe owns the
  contracts, the Tribe owns the data, no lock-in or termination fees, transparent
  supplier-paid economics (typically 15-20% of monthly recurring charges), no grant-farming,
  and in-person presence.
- /tribal/awards — NTIA TBCP award records compiled from public federal data
- /connectivity — Enterprise connectivity brokerage overview
- /data-center-connectivity — Data-center connectivity brokerage
- /map — Interactive infrastructure map (indigenous lands, broadband, power, transmission)
- /answers — Knowledge base on brokerage pricing, contracts, and process
- /call — Book a 15-minute discovery call (https://cal.com/jeramey-james/15min)
- /contact — Contact form

## Contact

- Book a call: https://cal.com/jeramey-james/15min
- Site: https://konative.com/contact
